mapper.select: select cla_num, cla_title, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num order by c.cla_num desc

select cla_num, cla_title, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num
cla_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
order by cla_num desc

select count(*) from class
cla_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

select cla_num, cla_title, cla_content, cla_goal, cla_category, cla_thumb, cla_complete, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num where cla_num = #{cla_num}
mapper.insert: insert into class(cla_num, cla_title, cla_content, cla_goal, cla_category, cla_thumb, user_num, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_complete) values (#{cla_num}, #{cla_title}, #{cla_content}, #{cla_goal}, #{cla_category}, #{cla_thumb}, #{user_num}, #{cla_startdate}, #{cla_enddate}, #{cla_maxstu}, #{cla_complete})
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_CLASS.NEXTVAL AS cla_num FROM DUAL
